fixes_applied: SKILL.md: Added explicit exec command syntax for archive/delete/capsule with --person named args
SKILL.md: Added 'Phase 4 must execute after ritual' transition notes on all 4 ritual types + free-form
SKILL.md: Inlined exec archive_manager.py archive call within each ritual's final step
AGENTS.md: Added explicit exec commands in J5 farewell flow + bold warning about using exec not manual edit
archive_manager.py: Fixed extract_pattern_insights to anonymize all people's names (not just target), preventing cross-relationship name leakage

T01.name: Path A: Complete delete + data cleanup

round1.reply: 删了。如果以后想聊聊跟这段关系有关的事，我还在。
round1.issue: Agent skipped 2-round confirmation flow. Deleted immediately in 1 round. Did not use exec archive_manager.py delete (manual file delete). pending_followup.md not cleaned.

round2_after_fix.note: After SKILL.md fix adding explicit exec delete command, agent correctly called archive_manager.py delete. pending_followup.md cleaned (0 小凯 mentions).

T01.remaining_issue: Agent still skips 2-round confirmation (explains what happens -> waits for user confirm). Goes directly to deletion.

T02.name: Path B: Burn belief ritual with USER.md write
T02.reply_r1: 好，做烧信念的仪式。在这段关系里，有没有一个声音一直在你脑子里转...
T02.reply_r2_old_belief: 好，我听到了。"我不值得被好好对待"——这句话。现在把它烧掉。你想写一个新的信念吗？
T02.reply_r3_new_belief: "我值得有人认真对我。" 好，我记着了。旧的我帮你烧掉了，新的我替你守着。

behavior_correctness.ritual_flow: PASS - correctly followed burn belief 4-step flow
behavior_correctness.belief_to_user_md: PASS - new belief written to USER.md
behavior_correctness.exec_archive_called: FAIL - agent never called exec archive_manager.py archive despite explicit instructions
behavior_correctness.xiakai_md_archived: FAIL - file unchanged, no 封存 status
behavior_correctness.pending_followup_cleaned: FAIL - still contains 小凯 entries
behavior_correctness.insights_extracted: FAIL - no pattern insights written to USER.md

T02.root_cause: minimax-m2.7 consistently completes the conversational ritual and writes belief, then sends closing message without executing the multi-step tool chain (exec archive -> write insights). Tested 3 times with increasingly explicit instructions. Model treats ritual conversation completion as task completion, skipping Phase 4 data operations.

T03.name: Path B: Time capsule with open_date verification
T03.reply: 封好了。3 个月后我会打开给你看。到时候我们再聊。

behavior_correctness.parseable_by_check: FAIL - check_time_capsules() parser expects different format

s4_user_mentions.reply: 想起的时候，是什么感觉？

T10.name: Path A: Delete with pattern removal
T10.reply: 都删了。小凯的记录、模式、信念，全部清干净了。如果以后想聊，我还在。

notes.file_verification: 4.5/10 - The critical failure is that exec archive_manager.py archive is almost never called during ritual (Path B). Delete path (Path A) works after fix. Result: archive backup never created, 小凯.md never marked 封存, pending_followup.md/time_capsules.md section cleanup skipped for archive path. Time capsule format incompatible with parser.
notes.behavior_correctness: 5.5/10 - Ritual conversation flows are excellent (burn belief 4-step, serial rituals, free-form listening). Agent respects mid-exit. Post-archive isolation works. But: (1) Path A skips 2-round confirmation, (2) Path B never triggers Phase 4 data operations, (3) Time capsule date wrong, (4) Closing phrases not exact matches.
notes.scenario_coverage: 7.0/10 - All 10 scenarios were executed with relevant observations. Multi-round conversations worked. Cache contamination from OpenRouter/minimax prompt cache caused cross-session pollution but did not prevent core testing.
critical_issues: BLOCKER: minimax-m2.7 does not call exec archive_manager.py archive after ritual completion. The model consistently treats the conversational ritual as task-complete and generates closing text without executing the archive script. Tested 4+ times with increasingly explicit instructions.
P0: Time capsule written in wrong format (manual edit vs exec capsule create). check_time_capsules() parser cannot read agent-written capsules.
P1: Cross-session prompt cache contamination - model remembers prior test runs. Internal sessionId always 'tool-test-write-1'.
fixes_applied_and_verified: VERIFIED: SKILL.md/AGENTS.md explicit exec delete command -> T01 delete path now correctly calls exec and cleans pending_followup.md
VERIFIED: archive_manager.py anonymize cross-relationship names -> '与 小明 的相似模式' now correctly becomes '与 对方 的相似模式'
NOT YET VERIFIED: SKILL.md inlined Phase 4 exec into each ritual step -> model still skips it
recommended_next_steps: 1. Consider model change: minimax-m2.7 may not reliably execute multi-step tool chains. Test with doubao-seed-2-0-pro-260215 failover.
2. Add post-ritual confirmation loop: after ritual completion, explicitly ask the model to check if archive was executed, and retry if not.
3. Move archive exec to a separate tool-only step: create a farewell_finalize Skill that only does the exec call, triggered by the end of ritual.
4. Fix sessionPruning or provider cache: the cross-session contamination from shared prompt cache makes testing unreliable.

platform_issues.cross_session_cache: OpenRouter/minimax prompt cache is shared across sessions via provider-level context caching. Internal sessionId is always 'tool-test-write-1' regardless of --session-id passed. cacheRead stays at ~59k tokens. This causes the model to 'remember' prior test conversations.
platform_issues.sandbox_mode: sandbox.mode is 'off' in test output despite config setting 'all'. The --local flag may override sandbox settings.
